description_long: This is a robust wooden bench with a slatted backrest and seat, designed for multiple people to sit comfortably. The bench features straight, sturdy legs and horizontal support bars for added stability. Both ends are equipped with armrests, providing additional comfort and support for users. The wood has a natural, medium-brown finish, showcasing visible grain patterns and a matte texture. The backrest consists of evenly spaced vertical slats, giving the bench a classic and timeless appearance. This type of bench is commonly found in parks, public gardens, or along urban sidewalks.
description: A sturdy, medium-brown wooden bench with a slatted backrest, armrests, and a classic design, suitable for outdoor public spaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bench, highlighting the armrest and the thickness of the seat and backrest.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the vertical slats of the backrest and the overall width of the bench.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the armrest and the depth of the seat.
description_view_3: Front view revealing the slatted backrest, both armrests, and the inviting seating area.
attribute_leg_design: four straight wooden legs with horizontal supports
